description: Flagstar Bank, National Association provides banking products and services in the United States. The company's deposit products include interest-bearing checking and money market, savings, and non-interest-bearing accounts, as well as certificates of deposit. It offers loan products comprising multi-family loans; commercial real estate loans; acquisition, development, and construction loans; commercial and industrial loans; one-to-four family loans; specialty finance loans and leases; warehouse loans; and home equity lines of credit, as well as other consumer loans, including overdraft loans.
